title: Steward and community-partner outreach (Wikimedia/library/revival org/broadcaster)
context: No partner organisation or last-mile steward has committed to host, cite, or reuse the corpus. Until a named partner commits, verifiedNeed=false on all tasks. This outreach task initiates contact with candidate partner types identified in PLAN.md: a Wikimedia chapter or Lingua Libre community; a public or national library or geographic names authority with an open-data mandate; a language-revitalisation organisation; and a broadcaster pronunciation unit. The goal is not to close a partnership here but to initiate, log, and track outreach so M0 can exit with documented progress.
objective: Identify at least 4 candidate partner organisations across the four candidate types (Wikimedia/Lingua Libre, library/names authority, language-revival org, broadcaster pronunciation unit), initiate contact or prepare contact materials for each, and produce a logged outreach document tracking status per candidate.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 4 candidate partner organisations are identified and documented, one from each candidate type (Wikimedia/Lingua Libre, library/geographic names authority, language-revival organisation, broadcaster pronunciation unit).
A contact approach or draft outreach message is prepared for each candidate.

An outreach log document (OUTREACH-LOG.md or equivalent) is committed tracking: org name, type, contact method, date initiated, and current status (not-contacted/contacted/responded/declined/in-discussion).
The log honestly records that verifiedNeed remains false and no partner has committed.
Maintainer reviews and approves the outreach log before the task is marked done.
output: OUTREACH-LOG.md committed via PR documenting at least 4 candidate partners and outreach status, approved by maintainer.
